response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely aligning with the role's primary stack. Her background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, along with measurable impact in high-throughput environments and open-source contributions. The breadth of her experience and leadership in technical initiatives makes her an excellent fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest experience
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not directly relevant
German language skills are basic (minor concern for Berlin-based role)
